title: geracium molle
intro: Geranium molle, also known as the dwarf geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Geranium molle include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
